sql_snippet: DELETE FROM LINEITEM_DML WHERE l_shipdate >= '1995-06-01' AND l_shipdate < '1995-07-01'

variant_details: Insert June 1995 lineitem data from source (~7.5M rows)
sql_snippet: INSERT INTO LINEITEM_DML SELECT * FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_shipdate >= '1995-06-01' AND l_shipdate < '1995-07-01'
full_sql:
INSERT INTO lineitem_dml
SELECT *
FROM lineitem
WHERE l_shipdate >= '1995-06-01'
  AND l_shipdate < '1995-07-01';
